backupTitle: Start backing up to the cloud
backupDesc: Sign in socially in just 3 seconds to keep your posture-violation logs and sensitivity settings safe forever.
communityHome: 🏠 Go to the intro & community home
betaPlanBody: During the beta, all PRO features are unlocked for free — no payment details needed. Just download the desktop app and start using it.
graceBody1: Payment couldn't be processed because your card hit its limit or expired.
graceBody2: If you don't update your card by {{date}}, PRO will automatically downgrade to the free (FREE) version.
proDesc: Desktop-only native app install access is enabled, with full support for effortless background monitoring and AI-tailored feedback coaching.
cardWebTitle: Manage your payment method securely on the web
cardWebBody: Card details are entered only in the Toss Payments secure checkout — the BaroSit app never stores your card number. The button below opens the billing page in your browser.
cardWebCta: Manage payment method on the web
freePlanDesc: You're on the web-only free plan. Try the desktop app, where the camera sensor keeps running without pausing even when you minimize or hide the window!
upgradeBtn: Upgrade to PRO and get the desktop app
cardSubmitting: Verifying card and exchanging billing key...
cloudDesc: You're connected with a social account. All device settings and posture logs are backed up and synced with the cloud server in real time.
logoutConfirmTitle: ⚠️ Are you sure you want to log out?
logoutConfirmDesc: Logging out pauses real-time posture data backup.
adminDesc: An admin account was detected. You can operate the admin dashboard or calibrate the standard range-of-motion model to improve detection sensitivity for all users.
adminDashboardWeb: 📊 Launch admin dashboard (open in web browser)
displayNameHint: Used inside the app only. It's separate from your account name at sign-in.
workEnvHint: Posture-analysis calibration options for your work setup may be added in the future.
adminModalTitle: Calibrate the standard stretch range model
adminModalDesc: Admin only: extracts the default 3-direction standard silhouette dataset applied service-wide.
refundConfirm:
Request a refund?
Once the refund completes, your plan switches from PRO to FREE and premium features such as background monitoring become unavailable.
refundSuccess: Your refund request was safely received. After admin approval, the refund and subscription reclaim will complete within 3 days.
refundError: An error occurred while requesting the refund. Please contact support.
cancelConfirm:
Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription?
Even after canceling, you can keep using it until this month's commitment expiry.
cancelSuccess: Auto-renewal has been canceled. Your benefits remain until the remaining period expires.
cancelError: An error occurred while requesting cancellation. Check your general permissions.
restoreSuccess: Auto-renewal was successfully restored! Your PRO benefits continue.
restoreError: An error occurred while restoring the subscription.
cardErrInvalidNumber: Invalid card number. Please check the number.
cardErrPwd: Enter the first 2 digits of your card password.
cardErrIdentity: Enter a 6-digit birthdate or 10-digit business registration number.
cardRegSuccess: Your card was successfully registered and payment info updated!
cardDeleteConfirm:
Delete your registered payment card?
If you have an active subscription, renewal may fail on the next billing date and the subscription may be suspended.
cardDeleteSuccess: Your payment card info was safely deleted.
cardDeleteError: An error occurred while deleting payment info: {{error}}
deleteSectionTitle: ⚠️ Delete account — permanent removal of your data
deleteWarn1: Once requested, your account and all profile & posture data are permanently deleted after 30 days.
deleteWarn2: During the 30-day grace period you can restore everything by signing back in and tapping "Cancel deletion."
deleteWarn3: Your active PRO subscription's auto-renewal is canceled. Payment & transaction records are kept for 5 years with identifiers removed, as required by law.
deleteAck: I understand and want to delete my account.
deleteSuccess: Your deletion request was received. Your account will be permanently deleted on {{date}}. Sign back in before then to cancel.
deleteError: Something went wrong while processing your request. Please try again shortly.
deletePendingBody: Your account and data are scheduled for permanent deletion on {{date}}. Changed your mind? Cancel below.
deleteUndoSuccess: Deletion canceled — your account has been restored.
deleteUndoError: Something went wrong while canceling. Please try again shortly.

web.betaPlanBody: It's a free beta right now, so you can use every PRO feature with no payment. Download the desktop app and get started.
web.notConfiguredBody: Fill in VITE_SUPABASE_URL / VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY in .env.local and restart. For detailed setup, see docs/auth-google-setup.md.
web.accountSubtitle: Basic information of your logged-in BaroSit account.
web.noPasswordPre: Need a copy of your data (export)?
web.noPasswordPost: and we'll take care of it.
web.planSubtitle: Manage your subscription status and payment method.
web.periodCanceled: Cancellation date · {{date}} (auto-switches to FREE after expiry)
web.refundNoticePre: If it is within 7 days of payment and you have no service usage history, we refund the full amount. Otherwise, annual plans are refunded after deducting the amount for days used and a penalty, while monthly plans can be cancelled and used until the paid period ends. The estimated refund is shown before you confirm. For exceptional refunds such as payment errors, contact
web.refundNoticePost: and we'll review and process each one manually and promptly.
web.freePlanDesc: You're currently on the web-browser-only free trial plan. To download the installable desktop app and enjoy effortless background monitoring and real-time AI coaching feedback, upgrade to the PRO plan!
web.cardChangeSuccess: 🎉 Your payment card was changed and updated successfully!
web.cardChangeError: A problem occurred while changing your payment card.
web.cardRegAborted: Card registration was canceled or failed. Please try again.
web.cardWindowError: An error occurred while opening the card registration window:
web.cancelConfirm:
Cancel your subscription?

Even if you cancel, you can keep using all PRO premium features (uninterrupted desktop background monitoring, AI coaching, etc.) until the end of the current billing cycle on {{date}}.
After that, it safely switches to the FREE plan with no further charges.
web.cancelSuccess: Your cancellation request was completed successfully. PRO benefits remain active for the rest of the period.
web.cancelError: An error occurred while canceling. Please contact support (support@barosit.com) and we'll handle it promptly.
web.cancelErrorShort: An error occurred while canceling the subscription.
web.resumeConfirm:
Withdraw your cancellation request and keep your PRO subscription?
As before, billing and renewal will run automatically on the expiry date.
web.resumeSuccess: Your cancellation request was withdrawn successfully. Your PRO subscription continues!
web.resumeError: An error occurred while resuming the subscription.
web.refundConfirm:
Request a refund?

Once the refund completes, you are immediately switched from PRO to FREE, and background monitoring and all premium benefits become unavailable.
web.refundSuccess: Your immediate refund and payment cancellation are complete. Thank you for using BaroSit.
web.refundError: A problem occurred while processing the refund. Please contact support (support@barosit.com) and we'll check and help promptly.
web.mockNotice:
Payment integration is currently in integrated mock-test mode.
Billing-cycle changes are handled manually, immediately, and safely via support (support@barosit.com). Email us and we'll help promptly!
web.refundBreakdownFull:
[Estimated refund]

You qualify for a cooling-off withdrawal, so the full amount of KRW {{refund}} will be refunded.
web.deleteCardNeedsCancel: To remove your payment method, cancel your subscription below first. You'll keep access until the current period ends.
web.deleteCardConfirm:
Remove the payment method on file?

Automatic recurring billing will stop. You'll need to add a payment method again to resubscribe.
web.deleteCardError: Something went wrong while removing the payment method. Please contact support.
web.scheduleYearlyConfirm:
Switch to the annual plan?

Nothing is charged now. From {{date}} (your next billing date) you'll be charged 36,000 KRW per year, and until then you stay on your current monthly plan.
You can cancel this scheduled change any time before that date.
web.scheduleYearlyDone: Annual switch scheduled. You'll be charged 36,000 KRW per year starting {{date}}.
web.cancelCycleChangeConfirm:
Cancel the scheduled switch to annual?
Your next billing will stay on the current monthly plan.
web.cancelCycleChangeDone: The scheduled annual switch has been cancelled.
web.pendingYearlyNotice: 📅 Your plan switches to annual (36,000 KRW/year) on {{date}}, your next billing date. Until then you stay on your current monthly plan.

refundBreakdownFull:
[Estimated refund]

You qualify for a cooling-off withdrawal, so the full amount of KRW {{refund}} will be refunded.
